message:
wip: experimental frozen function and polyfill changes

- Add native property accessors (nativeGetKind, nativeGetFlags, etc.)
- Add getPropertyValue/setPropertyValue for dynamic key access
- Update cfg_builder with improved control flow handling
- Enhance node_polyfill.js with better fs/path support
- Add process.zig improvements
- Update runtime.js polyfills
- Include debug/trace files for investigation

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+{
+  "name": "edgebox",
+  "version": "1.0.0",
+  "description": "QuickJS JavaScript runtime with **WAMR AOT compilation** for fast, sandboxed JavaScript execution at the edge.",
+  "main": "index.js",
+  "directories": {
+    "doc": "docs",
+    "example": "examples",
+    "test": "test"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
+  },
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "git+https://github.com/teamchong/edgebox.git"
+  },
+  "keywords": [],
+  "author": "",
+  "license": "ISC",
+  "type": "commonjs",
+  "bugs": {
+    "url": "https://github.com/teamchong/edgebox/issues"
+  },
+  "homepage": "https://github.com/teamchong/edgebox#readme",
+  "dependencies": {
+    "typescript": "^5.9.3"
+  }
+}
